description: Dual-mode notification component: dismissible banner or bell-icon panel with history + read tracking.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Which presentation mode to render (default: panel)

attributes.name: persist
attributes.description: Banner mode: VBStore key used to record dismiss state

attributes.name: expires
attributes.description: Banner mode: days until the banner re-shows after dismiss

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Panel mode: absolute URL or VBService role name for dynamic notifications

attributes.name: poll
attributes.description: Panel mode: polling interval in milliseconds

attributes.name: toast-new
attributes.description: Panel mode: fire a toast via the nearest <toast-msg> when a new dynamic notification arrives

attributes.name: storage-key
attributes.description: Panel mode: VBStore namespace for read state (default: notifications)

attributes.name: data-trigger
attributes.description: Panel mode: marks a custom trigger element, replacing the auto-generated bell
